result.summary: M2-5 complete: closed the tracking epic with audit evidence and recorded the close-out decisions; the follow-on epic is unblocked. Docs committed locally; not pushed, per the operator-push-approval rule.

M2-1 executed: moved the Node-only CI jobs to ubuntu-latest and added concurrency groups; opened a PR (not merged). Left the heavy build jobs on the self-hosted runner deliberately. All workflows validated.

Read-only smoke of the bench API seams: GETs and unauthenticated empty-body POSTs only, zero writes landed (every POST rejected at the auth gate before any handler ran). All planned seams exist and respond sanely; flagged one auth-model detail for the panel to handle.
